claim_under_attack: Segment decomposition is the single highest-leverage next step because it determines whether a targeted or broad intervention is needed, and can be completed this week with existing data.
evidence_or_reason: The artifact provides no visible evidence that segment concentration is more decision-critical than the other unresolved mechanisms it lists, especially pricing sensitivity (U3) or upsell-induced churn (U4). Even if churn is concentrated in one segment, that still does not identify the causal lever to pull within that segment, so calling decomposition the single highest-leverage next step is an unsupported prioritization claim rather than one grounded in demonstrated evidence.
